joke.1: Why did the maths book look sad? It had too many problems.
joke.2: What do you call a fish with no eyes? A fsh.
joke.3: What do you call cheese that is not yours? Nacho cheese.
joke.4: Why did the tomato turn red? It saw the salad dressing.
joke.5: What do you call a sleeping dinosaur? A dino-snore.
joke.6: What do you call a bear with no teeth? A gummy bear.
joke.7: Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field.
joke.8: What do you get from a pampered cow? Spoiled milk.
joke.9: Why can a bicycle not stand on its own? It is two-tired.
joke.10: What has ears but cannot hear? A cornfield.
joke.11: Why did the clock go to the doctor? It was ticking.
joke.12: What do elves learn in school? The elf-abet.
joke.13: Why do cows wear bells? Because their horns do not work.
joke.14: What do you call a cat that gets everything it wants? Purr-suasive.
joke.15: Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired of standing up.
